headline: Tech weakness, rate hike fears weigh as VIX drops and yields fall sharply

bullets.title: Fed Rate Hikes Expected in 2026
bullets.body: BofA and Deutsche Bank signal September hikes; Kevin Warsh's hawkish stance fueling rate expectations.

bullets.title: Tech Under Pressure Despite Market Flatness
bullets.body: QQQ -0.42%, MSFT -2.27%, NVDA -0.50%; growth concerns outweigh broad stability.

bullets.title: VIX Compression Amid Rate Uncertainty
bullets.body: VIX dropped 4.41% to 18.63; 10Y yield fell 2.03bps to 4.40%. Conflicting signals.

bullets.title: Small Cap Outperform as Rates Fall
bullets.body: IWM +0.46% while SPY flat; lower yields benefit rate-sensitive smaller equities.

bullets.title: Quantum & Space Stocks Crushed
bullets.body: IONQ -7.35%, RKLB -10.21%, ONDS -9.96%; sector-wide weakness signals broader growth repricing.

bullets.title: PCE Data Due This Weekend
bullets.body: May inflation data (May 1 Core PCE: 3.3%) critical for Fed rate-path confirmation.

bullets.title: Growth Concerns Resurface
bullets.body: Real GDP 1.6% (Q1); unemployment 4.3%. Market pricing slower growth + higher rates.

watchlistMovers.blurb: Space sector selloff continues; growth repricing pressure.
Mega-cap tech struggles amid rate expectations.
Small caps resilient as yield compression supports valuations.
